name: Emanation (Anger)
scaffolding_intent: Emits anger particles around the entity

parameters.name: tint
parameters.description: RGB tint shift applied to entity pixels (additive)

parameters.name: tintSaturation
parameters.description: How strongly the tint is applied (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint)

correction_intent: Child described the wrong emotion — the entity actually feels angry, frustrated, or irritated
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed that a character feels angry, frustrated, or irritated
